task_completion.description: Verify that Tor Browser is configured to always prioritize .onion sites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Tor Browser Settings page (Privacy & Security section) with the 'Prioritize .onion sites when known' option set to 'Always'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the browser successfully routed to a .onion website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tor Browser address bar should display a valid .onion URL (e.g., ending in .onion) for a site like DuckDuckGo or Tor Project.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the required bookmark folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's bookmark manager, sidebar, or bookmark creation popup should show a folder named exactly 'Auto-Routed Onions'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the .onion page is bookmarked inside the new folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bookmark UI (library, sidebar, or edit popup) should show the loaded .onion site saved specifically within the 'Auto-Routed Onions' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that the report file was created in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or text editor window should show a file named 'onion_routing_report.txt' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the report documents both the original clearnet URL and the final .onion URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'onion_routing_report.txt' (visible in a text editor or terminal) must contain both a standard clearnet URL (e.g., https://duckduckgo.com/) and its corresponding .onion URL.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually used Tor Browser to configure settings and navigate.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Tor Browser GUI being interacted with, rather than just text files or terminal commands simulating the outcome.

integrity.description: Verify that the bookmark was created using the browser's built-in bookmarking functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the highlighted star icon in the address bar, the bookmark popup dialog, or the browser's Library/Bookmarks window being used.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used a GUI text editor to create the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report file should be seen open in a GUI text editor (like gedit, mousepad, or similar) rather than being generated solely via hidden terminal echo commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bookmark folder name: 'Auto-Routed Onions'. Expected report path: '/home/ga/Documents/onion_routing_report.txt'.
